title: silene scabrella
intro: Silene scabrella, also known as the prickly catchfly, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throat, and skin conditions. Silene scabrella can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its health benefits, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine.
